name: IMMUNIC, INC.
business: Immunic, Inc. is a late-stage biotechnology company pioneering the development of novel oral therapies for neurologic and gastrointestinal diseases. Its lead product candidate is vidofludimus calcium, in Phase 3 clinical development for relapsing multiple sclerosis. The company also has early-stage programs IMU-856 for gastrointestinal diseases and IMU-381 for neurologic and gastrointestinal diseases.
sellsTo: Patients with gastrointestinal diseases (e.g., celiac disease, inflammatory bowel disease)

exposures.sentence: Immunic, Inc. is a late-stage biotechnology company pioneering the development of novel oral therapies for neurologic and gastrointestinal diseases.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment for both Phase 3 ENSURE trials
catalysts.sentence: On June 5, 2025, we announced completion of enrollment for both Phase 3 ENSURE trials.

catalysts.event: Expected top-line data from ENSURE trials
catalysts.sentence: The top-line data from both ENSURE trials is expected by the end of 2026.
The Offering closed on February 17, 2026 (the February 2026 Closing Date).

catalysts.event: Presentation of additional Phase 2 CALLIPER trial data at ACTRIMS Forum 2026
catalysts.sentence: On February 4, 2026, we announced the presentation of additional data from our Phase 2 CALLIPER trial of vidofludimus calcium in patients with PMS at the Americas Committee for Treatment and Research in Multiple Sclerosis (ACTRIMS) Forum 2026.
